visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a flat-patterned cap (main character) is framed in a medium close-up, holding a smartphone to record himself in a selfie-perspective. He is in a brightly lit exhibition hall with people walking in the blurred background. He gestures with his hand, showing four fingers, and looks directly into the lens with an expressive, smiling face. (2) The scene cuts to a vibrant yellow sports car parked on a display platform. The camera pans from the rear of the car to the side, highlighting the sleek aerodynamic lines and the prominent rear spoiler. The man's face is occasionally visible in a picture-in-picture or corner-inset, pointing toward the vehicle. (3) The camera shows extreme close-ups of mechanical motor components on pedestals labeled 'V6s' and 'V8s'. The parts are silver and metallic, showing intricate gears and wiring within transparent casings. The lighting is sharp, emphasizing the industrial textures of the technology. (4) Close-ups of specific car details follow: a carbon fiber side mirror, a high-performance tire with 'Pirelli' branding and yellow brake calipers, and the 'Xiaomi' brand logo on the rear. The camera uses quick jump cuts to shift between different angles of the yellow car, including the front grille and the 'SU7 Ultra' nameplate. (5) The man returns to a full-frame selfie view, nodding and smiling enthusiastically toward the camera while the exhibition crowd continues to move behind him. He points to himself and then back toward the car as the video concludes.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 大家好 我是Tim哥. (2) [Variety]: 超酷的!. [Slogan]: 小米SU7 ultra. (3) [Slogan]: 0-100km/h加速 1.98s. (4) [Slogan]: 0-200km/h加速 5.86s. (5) [Slogan]: 最高時速 350km/h. (6) [Variety]: 3馬達系統. [Slogan]: 達1548p. (7) [Slogan]: 續航 620km. (8) [Variety]: 高很多. (9) [Subtitle]: 全都使用碳纖維. [Variety]: 閃電黃色. (10) [Slogan]: 30.8m. (11) [Variety]: 極窄車位. [Variety]: 自動泊出. (12) [Variety]: 黑科技!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator filming selfie-style, at least 7 distinct passers-by visible in the background exhibition hall throughout various cuts.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a flat cap with a checkered pattern, clear-framed glasses, and a blue sweatshirt with 'ALAT' text.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large, modern exhibition hall with high ceilings, industrial lighting rigs, and multiple display booths. Other visitors and staff are seen moving in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal male voice speaking in a fast, energetic tone. A mid-tempo electronic BGM with a strong percussive beat starts immediately. Background noise consists of a soft, distant crowd murmur typical of a large indoor event. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as a transition occurs. The speaker's pitch rises with excitement while describing technical specifications. A 'ding' sound is heard simultaneously with a text graphic appearing. (3) The BGM continues steadily as the speaker's vocal intensity remains high. A subtle 'pop' SFX is heard during a quick jump cut between mechanical sounds. The speaker maintains a clear, professional broadcast-quality articulation. (4) Another 'whoosh' SFX signals a shift in focus. The ambient noise floor remains consistent with indoor exhibition hall resonance. The speaker's cadence is rapid but rhythmic, matching the upbeat tempo of the electronic music. (5) The speaker's voice drops slightly in pitch for a concluding statement, followed by a final 'ding' sound. The music maintains its volume until a sharp hard cut at the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Specification List -> Evaluation -> Closing
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and review the technical features and performance specs of the Xiaomi SU7 Ultra sports car at an auto show, utilizing an energetic influencer persona to build excitement and interest among tech and car enthusiasts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically focuses on one brand's product, highlights its performance advantages over competitors (BMW), and uses branded graphics throughout.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of motion graphics and sound effects typical of short-form social media reviews to maintain viewer engagement during technical data delivery.
